creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
Presumably because the makefile disables various modules, the following broken links are installed by this port:

1 lrwxr-xr-x  1 root wheel - 8 30 Nov 20:48 /usr/local/bin/pbibtex -> upbibtex
1 lrwxr-xr-x  1 root wheel - 9 30 Nov 20:48 /usr/local/bin/pdvitype -> updvitype
1 lrwxr-xr-x  1 root wheel - 8 30 Nov 20:48 /usr/local/bin/ppltotf -> uppltotf
1 lrwxr-xr-x  1 root wheel - 8 30 Nov 20:48 /usr/local/bin/ptftopl -> uptftopl

Please could either the links be removed, or the corresponding command installed.

Thanks.
